revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #E7E7FF; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-proprietary"|{{{1|[[Proprietary software|Proprietary]]}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
[[Category:Software table cell templates|Proprietary]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
